mainEntity.name: What is included in Monthly Photography Mentoring Sessions - Online - Zoom?

acceptedAnswer.text: Monthly Photography Mentoring Sessions - Online - Zoom includes the content and options shown on this page. Photography mentoring online. Receive a monthly assignment to increase your skills across multiple genres and get expert feedback on your images each month
